metadata.description: Short base name used to derive all resource names (e.g. "ai-agent-prod").
Azure region for all resources.
Resource tags applied to every resource.
Override the derived ACR name. Set this when an existing registry is in use.
Override the Container Apps Environment name. Set to adopt an existing environment.
Override the worker Container Apps Job name. Set to adopt an existing job.
Override the derived storage account name. Set to adopt an existing storage account.
Override the derived Redis cache name. Set to adopt an existing cache instance.
Fully-qualified API image (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/api:20250101.1200). Leave empty on first deploy to use a placeholder.
Fully-qualified Worker image (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/worker:20250101.1200). Leave empty on first deploy to use a placeholder.
Fully-qualified Qdrant image in ACR (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/qdrant:latest). Leave empty on first deploy; will be pushed by setup-azure.sh.
Fully-qualified Neo4j image in ACR (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/neo4j:5). Leave empty on first deploy; will be pushed by setup-azure.sh.
Neo4j username for the graph database.
Neo4j password for the graph database (set a strong value).

Override the derived ACR name (useful when adopting an existing registry).

Override the derived storage account name (to adopt an existing account).

Resource tags.
Override the derived Redis name (to adopt an existing instance).

Azure region.
Resource tags.
Log Analytics workspace resource ID.
Log Analytics customer ID (used for Container Apps env).
Log Analytics shared key.
ACR login server (e.g. myregistry.azurecr.io).
Resource ID of the ACR (used for role assignment).
Fully-qualified worker image tag (e.g. myregistry.azurecr.io/worker:20250101.1200).
Fully-qualified Qdrant image tag in ACR (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/qdrant:latest). Falls back to placeholder on first deploy.
Storage account name for Qdrant data.
Storage account key for Qdrant data.
File share name for Qdrant data.
File share name for Neo4j data.
Optional Qdrant API key.
Neo4j username.
Neo4j password (required — set a strong value).
Fully-qualified Neo4j image in ACR (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/neo4j:5).
Fully-qualified API image in ACR (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/api:20250101.1200).
Redis connection URL.
Qdrant collection name for tasks.
Qdrant collection name for chat messages.
Azure Subscription ID (used by API to trigger worker jobs).
Azure Resource Group name (used by API to trigger worker jobs).
Override the Container Apps Environment name (to adopt an existing env).
Override the worker job name (to adopt an existing job).
